creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
I am able to remove the ":infozip" suffix myself and it does extract ok
here.

When I wrote the port, it had "USE_ZIP= yes".  The "USES= zip" was added
by bapt in March 2014.  This was then changed to "USES= zip:infozip" by
antoine a day later with the comment "Unbreak" (rev 347929).

I'm CC'ing antoine to see if he has any recollection of why that was
needed.

I am fine removing the unzip port requirement if it is no longer needed.


Also, could you change the "@exec" in the do-install: rule of the Makefile
to "@postexec", please.  That gets rid of a deprecated warning.  Thanks.
